sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62413" key="leontomigh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεοντο-μῐγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μείγνυμι</etym>) <sense id="n62413.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-lion, half something else</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
